default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy sprint standup to discuss client progress, align on processes, and plan next steps for ongoing and new engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Emphasis on deeper client engagement in early weeks (1-2) to gather comprehensive inputs before strategizing](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Focus on delivering exceptional value to current clients, prioritizing their success over immediate upsells](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Transition planning for introducing new Managing Directors (MDs) to key accounts in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Positive progress and client satisfaction reported for several accounts (Monograph, Metronome, Airbyte, Interwell)](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

## Topics

### Early Engagement Process Refinement

  - [Identified need for more structured agendas and goals for each week of client engagements](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Aim to schedule product deep dives, expert interviews, and CMS walkthroughs in weeks 1-2](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Goal: Gather comprehensive inputs before presenting full strategy, mirroring successful approaches with Biologica and Town](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

### Monograph Strategy Development

  - [Current focus: Aligning on content strategy buckets and targeting mid-bottom funnel for increased product signups](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Next steps: Validate artifacts with client, conduct product deep dive, and begin loading assignments to Conan OS](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Metronome White Paper Strategy

  - [Approaching white paper as both a pillar CTA and content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Plan to decompose white paper into multiple content pieces, using it to enrich overall content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Goal: Connect all editorial content to aspects of the white paper, with the paper as the main CTA](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### Airbyte Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Focus on bulk editorial refreshing of \~4,000 existing AI-generated pages](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Implementing custom workflows for content enrichment and rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Aim: Improve content quality, cross-linking, and site experience while monitoring performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/ztztUqX7Hcvx3ZJA-PMBLu8DLQ6CEedj?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Interwell Content Development
